Pauha Chevdo

પૌહા ચેવડો

"The classic Gujarati chivda — light, crunchy, aromatic."

Pauha Chevdo (Poha Chivda) is a traditional Gujarati dry snack made from flattened rice (poha) roasted or fried with curry leaves, peanuts, green chillies and spices. It is light, crispy and incredibly flavourful. A staple in every Gujarati household, it is especially popular during Navratri fasting and as an everyday tea-time snack.

Spice Level

🔴🔴⚪⚪ Mild

Shelf Life

15–20 days

Available In

250g · 500g · 1kg

Best With

Morning or evening tea

Order on WhatsApp ← Full Menu

How It's Made

કેવી રીતે બને છે

Every batch at SSKFG is made by hand, the same way it has been since 1951. No shortcuts. No machines doing what hands can do better.

1

Thin poha (flattened rice) is lightly roasted or fried in oil with mustard seeds, curry leaves, green chillies and turmeric.

2

Peanuts, cashews and dried coconut are added for texture.

3

The mixture is seasoned with salt, sugar and a squeeze of lemon before cooling and packing.

Ingredients

સામગ્રી

Flattened Rice (Poha)PeanutsCashewsCurry LeavesGreen ChilliesMustard SeedsTurmericSugarSaltDried CoconutVegetable Oil

Contains Allergens

⚠ Tree Nuts (Cashew)⚠ Peanuts
